RULING:
PLAINTIFF TOM CHURCH'S Motion For Reconsideration Of Ruling: DENIED; Court lacks jurisdiction to entertain this motion for reconsideration because the Court entered judgment. See APRI Ins. Co. v. Superior Ct, 76 CA4th 176 (1999). (301/JLW/PB) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
